content: agent1: working on NDCG IDCG fix in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (RetrievalMetricResult / NDCG class). Will touch only that file.

agent1: My fix only touches the IDCG calc in NDCG.compute (lines ~380-386): changing ideal_length from min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) to len(expected_ids) alone, per standard NDCG definition. Should be a small, isolated diff — go ahead and build your relevance_scores param around it, just rebase on the updated ideal_length line if needed.

agent1: done. Change applied in metrics.py NDCG.compute — removed the 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' line; idcg now sums discounted_gain(rel=True, i, mode) for i in range(1, len(expected_ids)+1). No other lines in NDCG touched. You're clear to build the relevance_scores param on top of the current file state.
